name: agent-orch
description: CLI-driven Codex workflow for delegating implementation to Claude Code and targeted verification to Antigravity.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding to CC and verification to AGY.
interface.longDescription: A CLI-driven workflow that keeps Codex in charge of project planning and final acceptance while Claude Code implements and Antigravity performs targeted investigation or verification.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-orch to plan this change, delegate implementation to CC, and verify it.
Use agent-orch to ask AGY to investigate this failure without duplicating implementation.
